title: bromus hordeaceus var. racemosus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. racemosus, also known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of soft brome include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing digestive problems like diarrhea and stomach cramps. Soft brome can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture by extracting the active compounds with a solvent, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
